name: Cucumber Rounds with Smoked Salmon Mousse
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream cheese, at room temperature.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mousse ingredients in the bowl of a food processor and blend until the mixture is smooth. Chill for at least 30 minutes.
2. Cut each cucumber crosswise into approximately 20 slices, each slightly less than 1/4 inch thick. Cucumbers can also be peeled, streaked with fork tines or cut into decorative shapes with biscuit cutters.
3. Assemble the hors d'oeuvres no more than an hour before serving by softening the mousse with a wooden spoon and placing it in a pastry bag with a leaf tip.
4. Pipe the mousse onto each cucumber slice and garnish with a small watercress leaf.
5. If desired, you can slice the cucumbers slightly thicker than 1/4 inch and make a small hollow for the filling in the center of the slice using a melon-ball scoop.
